core_mechanism: bidirectional feedback coupling between an active population and the medium it inhabits, in which the agents both respond to the medium's state and continually reshape it, with the coupled dynamics propagating across nested spatial scales
brief_reason: The abstract centers on a 'two-way feedback' in which bacteria 'not only respond to their surroundings but continually reshape them,' and traces this coupled dynamics across three nested scales (single pore, mesoscale of many pores, landscape).
